features: 💪 Workout Mode Updates — Auto-disable unsupported source filters for CSEB and smoother dropdown population.
📊 Better PDF Parsing — The Report Analyzer now strictly parses your PDFs with no errors due to missing colons.
📄 Accurate PDF Weekly Target Progress — Subject Progress in the Study PDF now accurately reflects this week's hours instead of lifetime hours.
⚡ Performance Overhaul — Added deep debouncing for rendering and optimized caching for speed.
🔥 Correct Timezone Grouping — Weekly charts and PDF Attendance reports now flawlessly group from Sunday to Saturday based strictly on your local timezone.
